messages.content: when was roblox released
Roblox was officially released on September 1, 2006.
who are the co-founders of roblox
The co-founders of Roblox are David Baszucki and Erik Cassel.
private servers were formerly known as...
Private servers in Roblox were formerly known as VIP servers.
which youtuber won the season 1 of RB battles championship
The YouTuber who won the Season 1 of the RB Battles Championship was KreekCraft.
When was roblox first release on  devices
Roblox was first released on devices on December 22, 2012.
can you get robux for making games

Yes, as a game developer on Roblox, you can earn Robux through the platform's Developer Exchange (DevEx) program. By meeting certain requirements and monetizing your games effectively, you can exchange the earned Robux for real currency.
what is the very first roblox game to reach 1b+ visits
The first Roblox game to reach 1 billion or more visits is "Adopt Me!" created by the development team named DreamCraft. It achieved this milestone on August 6, 2020.
when was roblox first release on Xbox
Roblox was first released on Xbox on November 20, 2015.
whats the first ugc item to reach 2M+ purchases

As of my knowledge cutoff date in October 2021, the first UGC (User-Generated Content) item on Roblox to reach 2 million or more purchases is the "Blonde Spiked Hair" created by a user named named Beanzito. It reached this milestone on February 27, 2021. Please note that this information may have changed since then.
how many hats can you wear at the same time without using the advanced feature

In Roblox, you can wear only one hat at a time without using the advanced feature that allows you to wear multiple hats simultaneously. By default, the game allows players to have one hat equipped on their avatar's head.
how much is 30000 robux currently worth (DevEx rate)

The Roblox Developer Exchange (DevEx) rate is subject to change, so it's best to refer to the official Roblox Developer Exchange page for the most accurate and up-to-date information. As of my knowledge cutoff date in October 2021, the DevEx rate is approximately $350 USD for every 100,000 Robux. 

Therefore, 30,000 Robux would be worth around $105 USD based on the DevEx rate at that time. However, please note that these rates can fluctuate, so it's always recommended to check the official DevEx page for the current rate.
you need to pay... Robux to change your username

As of Roblox's current policy, changing your username requires payment in Robux. The specific cost depends on the type of Roblox membership you have:

1. For regular free members, it costs 1,000 Robux to change your username.
2. For Roblox Premium (formerly known as Builders Club) members, the cost is reduced to 200 Robux.

Please note that these pricing details are subject to change, and it's always best to check the Roblox website or app for the most up-to-date information on username change costs.
is it free to make games in roblox

Yes, it is free to create games in Roblox. Roblox provides a platform and set of tools for users to develop their own games without any cost. However, if you choose to monetize your games or access certain premium features, there may be associated costs or requirements. But the basic game creation and development process itself is free of charge.
